headlines.title: Tehran-Dubai flights to restart after Israeli-US war

headlines.title: Israel took wounded Palestinian from hospital; 18 months later, family told he is dead
headlines.snippet: Eighteen months after Israeli forces bombed the vehicle he was in, the family of Majdi Nour Abu Ara has been informed he died. Israeli authorities had concealed his fate since the December 3, 2024, drone strike in the occupied West Bank.

headlines.title: Israel kills three Palestinians in Gaza attacks
headlines.snippet: Israeli attacks in Gaza have resulted in the deaths of at least three Palestinians. Two were killed by a drone strike west of Beit Lahia, while another was killed when an Israeli warplane bombed a tent in Khan Younis.

headlines.title: Iran and Lebanon speakers discuss Israel’s war
